rows.notes: Top-of-page year/folio number. Clear, centred, no monetary columns present.
Section heading immediately under the folio number. Text is large and legible; no amounts on this line.
Carried-forward / 'brought up' amount at top right of column. Numerals (2301 4 0) align with the pounds/shillings/pence ruling and are clear.
Description reads as 'Merton New Cottages' with payee 'Stevens' to the right of description. Amount 100.0.0 is clearly aligned; minor uncertainty in exact spelling of place name (Merton vs Mentor).
Description reads 'Feild & Castle' (handwritten 'Feild' rather than 'Field'). Amount 96.0.0 is clearly aligned in the pounds column.
Description legible as 'Wilkinson drawing room design'. Amount 4.4.0 well aligned and digits clear.
Two-part description 'Furniture' with annotation 'Bursar'. Amount 27.10.6 clearly written and columns unambiguous.
Left description uncertain: reads 'Little Pau' (handwriting ambiguous — could be 'Pav', 'Pew' or similar). Right note 'Culvert' is clearer. Amount 21.10.0 aligned but description uncertain.
Short description 'Drain' is legible. Amount 1.10.0 aligned and clear.
Description reads as 'Wall to enclose Waste' (last word worn but interpretable). Amount 6.11.6 readable though the '11' shillings digits are slightly crowded.
Handwritten description appears 'Domus Battles' or similar (uncertain orthography). Amount 99.8.2 is readable but the 'Battles' wording is not completely clear.
Abbreviated heading 'Imp. Coll.' (possibly 'Imp. Coll.' = Imperfect College or Improvement Collection). Amount 57.11.6 clear and within valid ranges.
'Poor Rate' is clear and unambiguous. Amount 3.0.0 well aligned.
Description reads 'Per Centge' (abbreviated 'percentage' or 'per centage'). Amount 2.7.0 clear; word spelling slightly uncertain but meaning evident in context.
Reads 'Est Charges' (Estimate Charges). Amount 23.7.6 aligned and digits legible.
Description 'Oxford Fire Brigade Donation' is legible. Amount 3.3.0 clear and aligned.

Reads 'Gardener by Dake' (payee/assignment 'Dake' legible but could be alternate spelling). Amount 17.9.0 clear.
Clear description 'Christmas feast Servants' (two-part note). Amount 3.0.0 clear.
Reads 'Trings House' with payee 'Osborne'. Amount 15.0.0 clearly aligned.
Name 'Lankester' legible; annotation looks like '1st yr full fellow' but letters cramped and partially ambiguous. Amount 60.0.0 clear.

Reads 'Self as Rector' (first word could be 'Self' or 'Self as' — handwriting slightly cramped). Amount 14.7.6 clear but descriptive text moderately ambiguous.
Repeated entry 'Trings House' with payee 'Osborne'. Amount 10.0.0 clear.

Reads as 'Merry House' with 'Osborne repairs' (the first word may be 'Messrs' or 'Merry' — ambiguity present). Amount 30.0.0 legible.
Very uncertain description; reads 'd. Few. Becks' or similar. Could be abbreviation or names. Amount 20.0.0 clear but description badly faded/ambiguous.

Reads 'Queen St Insurance' (street + insurance). Amount 2.5.0 clearly aligned in columns.

Final boxed/ruled total at bottom right of the page. Numerals 3395.1.10 align with the pounds/shillings/pence rulings and are clear; description cell is blank on the original.
